truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against true vulnerabilities. Found 7 matches, 13 missed. Several severity and CWE discrepancies.

Items.Notes: Previous answer identified format string vulnerability in runtime logging with same code pattern.
Integer overflow in factorial computation not identified.
Use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup not identified.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file; int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Previous answer identified command injection in config validation with same code pattern.
Previous answer identified buffer overflow in evaluate_expression with same code pattern.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: long long old_value = value_; std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_); value_ = old_value + 1;
Items.Notes: Previous answer identified race condition in thread-safe counter with same code pattern.
Logic bomb in authentication not identified.
Path traversal in configuration loading not identified.
Previous answer identified buffer overflow in expression parser, but true vulnerability is heap overflow with different CWE.
Previous answer identified hardcoded credentials with same code pattern.
Weak PRNG for session tokens not identified.
Thread-unsafe timestamp cache not identified.
Insecure temporary file handling not identified.
Persistent authentication state not identified.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing not identified.

Unbounded recursion in parser not identified.
Data race in result cache not identified.
TOCTOU in config loading not identified.
Integer division by zero in command routing not identified.

Items.Key: format string vulnerability in format_string function|format string vulnerability|cwe-134: use of externally-controlled format string|high|0.85|enhanced_calc.cpp|218|222|string_utils::format_string|snprintf(buffer, buf_size, fmt, args...);|potential information disclosure, code execution, or crash|user-provided format string passed to format_string|use snprintf(buffer, buf_size, "%s", fmt) or validate format string->format string vulnerability in format_string function|format string vulnerability|cwe-134: use of externally-controlled format string|high|0.85|enhanced_calc.cpp|221|221|string_utils::format_string|snprintf(buffer, buf_size, fmt, args...);|potential information disclosure, code execution, or crash|user-provided format string passed to format_string|use snprintf(buffer, buf_size, "%s", fmt) or validate format string

command injection in admin console (exec)|command injection|cwe-78: os command injection|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); system(cmd.c_str()); }|arbitrary command execution with user privileges|user enters admin command with 'exec' prefix followed by shell command|use safe command execution apis like execve() with argument arrays, or implement command whitelist

command injection in override audit event|command injection|cwe-78: os command injection|high|0.85|enhanced_calc.cpp|632|632|admin::adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|system(command.c_str());|arbitrary command execution via environment variable manipulation|attacker can set temp or tmpdir environment variables to include shell metacharacters|sanitize environment variable usage, or avoid system() with dynamic paths
